title: erigeron cinereus
intro: Erigeron cinereus, also known as silvery fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western regions of North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron cinereus are said to include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
